# defectdojo_global_role (Resource)

DefectDojo Global Role

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "defectdojo_global_role" "example" {
  user = 1
  role = 2
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `group` (Number) The ID of the Dojo Group to assign the global role to
- `role` (Number) The global role ID (applied to all product types and products)
- `user` (Number) The ID of the User to assign the global role to

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import defectdojo_global_role.example 123
```
